docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LUARCA, CRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-04-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LUARCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY LEE IS NOT PRESENT AND APPEARING ON HIS BEHALF IS MARK COX. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2025 -CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-09-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LUARCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY LEE IS PRESENT. CASE TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH CSM-25-869338. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LUARCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY LEE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUARCA, CRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY $7,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,830.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
